title: cc:proofread record
description: Discriminated union of the three record types emitted by cc:proofread lenses and the orchestrator. JSONL files written under /tmp/cc-proofread-<run-id>/ mix all three.

CheckId.description: Kebab-case identifier matching a check defined in default-criteria.md (or a project criteria.md override). Validators do not enforce the registry — that's the orchestrator's job — but the pattern is enforced.

Location.description: Where in the artifact the claim appears. file is optional for piped/pasted text. section is a free-form pointer (e.g. heading text) for narrative artifacts where line numbers shift between edits.

Evidence.description: Substrate-grounded counter-evidence. Only meaningful for grounding lens findings. substrate_field is a pointer (yaml path, file path, Amplitude chart id, etc.) that the orchestrator can re-query; substrate_value is the actual value re-queried fresh (not the draft's interpretation); draft_claim is the in-draft assertion the substrate contradicts.

claim.description: The in-draft claim being audited (quoted or paraphrased).

finding.description: What's wrong, in adversarial voice. NOT 'consider whether...' — 'this claim contradicts X'.

remediation.description: Concrete action (may be empty string when the lens deliberately refuses to prescribe a fix).

convergent_with.description: Finding ids (UUIDs) that flagged the same root cause; populated by the orchestrator's dedup pass.

id.description: Stable identifier used by convergent_with cross-references.

Coverage.description: One coverage record per lens run. Feeds the coverage transparency line in the final output.

truncated_counts.description: Per-check_id count of findings suppressed by the ccp-017 throttle. Only present when at least one check exceeded its --max-findings-per-check cap. Key is the original check_id (e.g. 'hedge-promotion-regex'); value is the number of suppressed findings beyond the cap.

error.description: Set when the lens failed (see ccp-009/010). Honestly reported by the orchestrator in the coverage line instead of silent omission.

RunRecord.description: One record per /cc:proofread invocation. Anchors the JSONL stream for any given run.

artifact_hash.description: SHA256 hex of piped/pasted text when no file path is available.

criteria_source.description: Filesystem path to the criteria.md actually used (project override or default).
